---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to add.

## Motivation

Why is this feature useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How would you implement this? Which package(s) would be affected?

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Relevant Context

- Which architecture layer does this belong to? (`autonomy/`, `vision/`, `skypilot/`, etc.)
- Does this require AirSim changes?
- Does this affect the safety gate?
